properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 82/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA
 1. ONE SCIENTIFIC SOUNDING ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOYA SPACE IN THE PERIOD 0200 TO 0900 UTC DAILY FROM 20 TO 30 JUN 22. 
 VESSELS IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THESE THREE HAZARD AREAS:

 DANGER AREA, STORT INNER.
 A. 69-17.2N 016-00.5E.
 B. 69-17.6N 016-02.5E.
 C. 69-21.5N 015-58.2E.
 D. 69-26.0N 015-52.0E.
 E. 69-24.6N 015-45.3E.
 F. 69-20.4N 015-53.2E.
 G. 69-17.2N 016-00.5E.

 DANGER AREA ,STORT MIDDLE.
 A. 69-52.7N 014-57.3E.
 B. 69-54.6N 015-06.9E.
 C. 70-08.2N 014-53.3E.
 D. 70-26.6N 014-21.3E.
 E. 70-35.8N 013-53.4E.
 F. 70-33.7N 013-44.0E.
 G. 70-20.5N 013-57.3E.
 H. 70-03.1N 014-27.5E.
 I. 69-52.7N 014-57.3E.

 DANGER AREA, STORT OUTER.
 A. 71-35.0N 011-45.0E.
 B. 71-38.1N 011-58.8E.
 C. 72-12.9N 011-21.8E.
 D. 72-50.9N 010-00.4E.
 E. 73-01.8N 008-50.2E.
 F. 72-58.2N 008-35.1E.
 G. 72-34.9N 008-52.5E.
 H. 71-56.8N 010-19.6E.
 I. 71-35.0N 011-45.0E.

 2. REFERS NOTICES TO MARINERS (EFS 11-2022).
 3. CANCEL THIS MESSAGE 301000 UTC JUN 22.
